overview.title: Growth Control
overview.description: Operator surface for growth code lifecycle, abuse signals, referral reward posture, and linked promo or gift operations.

metrics.totalCodesHint: Canonical growth code records across invite, referral, promo, and gift lifecycles.
metrics.redemptionsHint: Final code uses already converted into discount, entitlement, or reward outcomes.
metrics.blockedSignalsHint: Rewards or abuse items already marked for risk attention.
metrics.availableCreditHint: Referral credit currently available in the non-withdrawable growth ledger.

overview.routesDescription: Growth is implemented only where backend admin coverage is real. Each route below maps to an existing operator-safe surface.

routes.promoCodes: Create, inspect, update, and deactivate campaign promo codes.
routes.inviteCodes: Generate invite batches for a specific user with optional plan targeting.
routes.giftCodes: Issue single or batch customer gift codes, inspect live inventory, and track redemption posture.
routes.partners: Promote users, review the live partner directory, and jump into customer operations.
routes.referrals: Monitor referral commissions, top referrers, and recent conversion-linked earnings.

overview.liveSignalsDescription: Recent outbox-backed growth lifecycle events from code issue through reward or redemption.
overview.liveSignalsEmpty: No recent lifecycle events were emitted yet.
overview.breakdownDescription: Compact readout of current code statuses and lifecycle posture.
overview.topRejectionsEmpty: No rejection pressure is visible yet.

reporting.title: Reporting Rollups
reporting.description: Persisted daily growth rollups over canonical code lifecycle tables. This is reporting truth, not a live resolver debug view.
reporting.empty: No reporting rollups are available for this window yet. Refresh the reporting layer first.

health.title: Refresh Health
health.description: Freshness, lag, and last-run posture for the scheduled reporting pipeline.

governance.title: Governance Coverage
governance.description: Audit timeline and delivery-governance decisions for silent reporting coverage gaps.
governance.followupEmpty: No governance follow-up work is open right now.
governance.emptyDecisions: No recent suppressed or domain-blocked reporting decisions were recorded.
governance.emptyAudit: No recent governance audit entries were recorded.

distribution.title: Recurring Distribution
distribution.description: Managed reporting subscriptions for finance, product, risk, and ops recipients.
distribution.createHint: Subscriptions claim fresh reporting snapshots and publish them through the worker delivery pipeline.
distribution.createFailed: Subscription creation failed. Check cadence, audience, and backend validation.
distribution.empty: No recurring reporting subscriptions are configured yet.

deliveries.title: Recent Reporting Deliveries
deliveries.description: Latest recurring reporting publications with delivery status, freshness posture, and exportable artifacts.
deliveries.empty: No recurring reporting deliveries have been recorded yet.

overview.deliveryOpsDescription: Send operator-authored customer notices and control live growth notification delivery state from the same console.
overview.deliveryFeedDescription: Recent per-channel growth deliveries with resend, pause, revoke, and resolve controls.
overview.deliveryFeedEmpty: No growth notification deliveries matched the current filter.

deliveryOps.manualHint: Manual notices respect customer growth delivery preferences and land in the canonical delivery ledger.
deliveryOps.manualFailed: Manual notification failed. Check the payload and backend response.

deliveryForensics.title: Delivery Forensics
deliveryForensics.empty: Select a delivery to inspect its support timeline.
deliveryForensics.siblingEmpty: No sibling channel deliveries were recorded for this notification.
deliveryForensics.queueEmpty: This delivery is not currently linked to an async queue item.
deliveryForensics.sourceEmpty: No source summary is available for this delivery.
deliveryForensics.timelineEmpty: No delivery timeline events were recorded yet.

operatorNotes.invitesDescription: Backend exposes admin invite generation but no admin list/detail inventory yet. This module keeps deterministic batch generation and local result readback.
operatorNotes.partnersDescription: Admin can promote, search, and inspect partner-level performance, but payout moderation is still the next workflow.
operatorNotes.giftsDescription: Admin can issue single or batch gift codes and inspect active or redeemed inventory without leaving the growth console.
operatorNotes.referralsDescription: Admin-safe overview and per-user drill-down are live. The remaining work is abuse review and deeper attribution analytics.

overview.planTargetingDescription: Growth operations already benefit from plan awareness, especially for invite batches and targeted promo setup.

promoCodes.title: Promo Inventory
promoCodes.description: Admin console for campaign codes, usage ceilings, expiry windows, and safe deactivation.
promoCodes.createPanelDescription: Expose the full admin create surface, including advanced targeting fields that are currently write-only in the API contract.

lookup.title: Growth Code Lookup
lookup.description: Resolve any growth code with an operator-supplied context before touching live checkout state.
lookup.empty: Enter a code to inspect its current lifecycle and eligibility state.

promoCodes.inspectPanelDescription: Detail route is wired to the dedicated promo endpoint, not only the list response.
promoCodes.inspectEmpty: Select a promo row to inspect it.
promoCodes.singleUseHint: Use this for one-off redemptions or tightly controlled campaigns.

metrics.totalHint: All promo records returned by admin list.
metrics.activeHint: Still redeemable and not manually disabled.
metrics.exhaustedHint: Reached max uses and likely need cleanup.

inviteCodes.title: Invite Batch Generator
inviteCodes.description: Create invite codes for a specific user with free-day grants and optional plan binding.
inviteCodes.formDescription: This route intentionally focuses on deterministic creation because the backend still lacks an admin list endpoint for invite inventory.
inviteCodes.generatedDescription: Result readback from the last successful admin batch operation.
inviteCodes.generatedEmpty: No invite codes generated in this session.
inviteCodes.backendNote: Admin coverage here is real but narrow: create batches now, add inventory and redemption analytics later when backend routes exist.

metrics.lastBatchHint: Codes returned by the latest create call.
metrics.planCatalogHint: Available plans for optional invite targeting.
metrics.modeHint: No admin list endpoint exists yet.
metrics.lastCodeHint: First code from the latest generated batch.

giftCodes.title: Gift Inventory
giftCodes.description: Issue single or batch customer gift codes, inspect redemption status, and keep operator-visible gift inventory under one admin surface.
giftCodes.issuePanelDescription: Create one or more customer-owned gift codes from the live plan catalog and keep recipient context in the canonical lifecycle.
giftCodes.filtersDescription: Filter the live gift inventory by owner user and audit the resulting redemptions without leaving the growth console.
giftCodes.inventoryDescription: Live admin inventory for active, redeemed, and operator-issued gift codes.
giftCodes.empty: No gift codes matched the current filter.

metrics.totalHint: Canonical gift code records returned by the admin inventory.
metrics.activeHint: Gift codes still available for redemption.
metrics.redeemedHint: Gift codes already converted into entitlement grants.
metrics.lastIssuedHint: Most recent batch or code emitted from this admin session.

partners.title: Partner Operations
partners.description: Unified operator surface for partner applications, workspace inventory, lane decisions, payout review, and linked governance workflows.
partners.formDescription: Provide the mobile user UUID and trigger the real admin promotion endpoint. Workspace and application inventories refresh from live backend contracts.
partners.queueDescription: Submitted partner applications with readiness, lane statuses, and requested-info pressure.
partners.queueEmpty: No partner applications are waiting in the current queue.
partners.inventoryDescription: Search live partner workspaces across lifecycle states and open the current operational slice.
partners.inventoryEmpty: No partner workspaces matched the current filter.
partners.workspaceDescription: Current workspace identity, program posture, membership snapshot, and code inventory.
partners.workspaceEmpty: Select a workspace or application to open the operator console.
partners.applicationDescription: Review applicant profile, request info, and move the workspace through probation decisions.
partners.applicationEmpty: This workspace does not currently expose an application review record.
partners.programsEmpty: No lane memberships were returned for the selected workspace.
partners.codesEmpty: The selected workspace has no codes yet.
partners.financeDescription: Review payout accounts, approve or reject payout instructions, and inspect execution posture.
partners.payoutAccountsEmpty: No payout accounts were returned for the selected workspace.
partners.payoutInstructionsEmpty: No payout instructions are open for this workspace.
partners.payoutExecutionsEmpty: No payout executions are linked to the selected workspace.
partners.signalsDescription: Traffic declarations, creative approvals, review requests, and case signals for the selected workspace.
partners.signalsEmpty: No compliance or creative review signals are open for the selected workspace.
partners.opsLinksDescription: Risk, governance, and audit stay on their dedicated admin consoles and are linked here for fast handoff.

metrics.applicationsHint: workspace applications currently exposed to admin review
metrics.workspacesHint: partner workspaces returned by the current live inventory filter
metrics.laneDecisionsHint: non-approved lane states visible in the current application queue
metrics.financeReviewHint: payout accounts and payout instructions still requiring operator action

defaults.reasonSummary: Reviewed manually from the admin partner operations console.
defaults.requestInfoMessage: Please provide the missing operating, compliance, or lane-specific evidence so the review can continue.

referrals.title: Referral Signals
referrals.description: Operational view of abuse pressure, blocked rewards, and referral lifecycle events after the growth-codes cutover.
referrals.abuseQueueDescription: Repeated rejection clusters and blocked rewards that need operator triage before they become support or fraud incidents.
referrals.abuseQueueEmpty: No growth abuse signals are open right now.
referrals.breakdownDescription: Current referral reward posture after holds, risk blocks, and availability transitions.
referrals.lifecycleEmpty: No referral lifecycle events have been emitted yet.

metrics.availableCreditHint: Referral reward amount currently available in the canonical non-withdrawable balance.
metrics.blockedRewardsHint: Reward allocations currently held back by risk decisions.
metrics.totalRedemptionsHint: Redemption volume already linked to the growth code lifecycle.
metrics.activeReservationsHint: Quote reservations that still hold a growth-code claim.
